title: lastrea walkerae
intro: Lastrea walkerae, also known as Walkerae fern or the Walkerae lastrea, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is a medicinal plant used in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The leaves of the Lastrea walkerae can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are said to have health benefits including reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and supporting respiratory health.
